'''Foulahn City''' was a [[City/Legends|metropolis]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]], the home of [[Spaarti Creations]]. [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Pilester Binalie]], owner of [[Spaarti Creations]], owned a mansion near Foulahn City.

{{City-stub}}
